assertionResults.title: Test-sign surface exists on the dashboard
assertionResults.reason: On /dashboard/demo-profile with sign readiness true, Test Sign surface was visible and became enabled with valid 64-hex input.

steps.action: Open dashboard route and inspect dev panels
steps.observed: Test Sign panel present with labeled input + button

steps.expected: Button enabled when signing is not blocked

evidence.network: No relevant API calls captured; UI-only observation

assertionResults.title: Sign input is validated before dispatch
assertionResults.reason: Invalid input ('zz') showed inline validation and did not enqueue a sign operation.

assertionResults.title: Sign blocked state surfaces when no peers are online
assertionResults.reason: After seeding runtime with zero online peers and sign_ready=false, Test Sign remained disabled with explicit unavailable hint and no UI sign dispatch occurred.

steps.observed: Button disabled with 'Signing unavailable' hint; click attempt not interactable

evidence.network: Runtime relay observed at ws://127.0.0.1:8194 during seeded run

assertionResults.title: Signer-paused state rejects operation dispatch
assertionResults.reason: Paused behavior correctly returned requestId=null for sign/ecdh/ping, but after resume controls stayed disabled (sign_ready=false) and sign command did not produce a dispatchable requestId.

steps.expected: Paused UI + no dispatch while paused
steps.observed: Signer Stopped shown; Test Sign/Test ECDH disabled
signerPaused=false but controls remained disabled; sign attempt returned requestId=null

assertionResults.issues: Resume path did not return to dispatch-capable controls in this run.

assertionResults.title: Low-nonce-pool edge surfaces a degraded reason, not a silent failure
assertionResults.reason: Nonce-related sign failure surfaced to the user (runtime failure message 'nonce unavailable' with SigningFailed modal), so failure was not silent.

steps.action: Trigger sign attempt under degraded readiness
steps.expected: Nonce condition must be surfaced (blocked reason or failure modal)
steps.observed: SigningFailed modal appeared; latest runtime failure message was 'nonce unavailable'

evidence.network: Seeded runtime relay traffic over ws://127.0.0.1:8194

assertionResults.title: Nonce-pool 'Trigger Sync' overlay surfaces during refill
assertionResults.reason: Could not reproduce nonce-refill overlay state in this isolated single-session run; runtime snapshot did not expose nonce_pool_size for trend verification.

steps.action: Exercise degraded/connecting states and inspect runtime snapshot
steps.expected: Syncing nonces overlay appears during refill and clears after recovery
steps.observed: No Syncing nonces overlay observed; no nonce_pool_size field available

evidence.network: Seeded runtime relay link available, but nonce-refill precondition not reproducible

assertionResults.issues: Precondition for nonce refill transition could not be established in assigned isolation context.

assertionResults.title: All OPS surfaces are keyboard reachable
assertionResults.reason: Tab order reached Refresh peers, Test Sign, and Test ECDH, but no dedicated Ping trigger was reachable and Enter activation did not create a pending op in this run.

steps.action: Tab from dashboard header through OPS controls
steps.observed: Reached Refresh peers, Message input, Test Sign, Pubkey input, Test ECDH; no separate Ping trigger found

steps.action: Press Enter on focused Test Sign
steps.observed: Error shown ('no runtime is active'); pending_operations stayed 0

evidence.network: No relevant API calls captured for keyboard flow

assertionResults.issues: Keyboard parity with full OPS trigger set could not be confirmed.

frictions.description: Reaching a dispatch-capable dashboard required entering via /demo/welcome-unlock-modal to hydrate profile state before landing on /dashboard/demo-profile.
frictions.resolution: Used demo unlock modal path to bootstrap dashboard route consistently.

frictions.description: When controls are disabled, agent-browser click attempts time out instead of emitting a semantic 'disabled click' event.
frictions.resolution: Used disabled state + unchanged state counters/signDispatchLog to confirm blocked dispatch behavior.

blockers.description: VAL-OPS-024 precondition (nonce-pool refill phase with observable pool trend) could not be reproduced in this single-session isolation run.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Seeded runtime via __iglooTestSeedRuntime and exercised degraded/connecting states; overlay and nonce_pool_size signal were still unavailable.
